Venue Info
Media Gallery
Ford Idaho Center Arena
Nampa, ID
Seating Capacity: 12279
Venue Type : Indoor Arena

Total Gigs: 1
  DMB  (1)

Longest Performance:
11.08.22 - #41 (10:38)
Venue Picture
Description
The Ford Idaho Center is a complex of sports and entertainment venues in Nampa, Idaho, approximately 15 miles west of Boise. It annually hosts the Snake River Stampede, considered one of the nation's top rodeos, during the third week in July. Ford Arena is the former home of the Idaho Stampede, then of the Continental Basketball Association from 1997 to 2005 and the Idaho Stallions of the now defunct Indoor Professional Football League in their inaugural season of 1999. Ford Arena is also the former home of the NAIA Division II men's basketball tournament.
